fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 30-year-old Hispanic female with schizophrenia for routine follow-up.
fields.Subjective: Patient presented appearing bright and engaged. Reports excellent adherence to aripiprazole 15 mg every morning taken with breakfast, uses pillbox organizer to stay on track. States feeling really stable and happy. Experiences very occasional fleeting suspicious thoughts once or twice monthly which she recognizes aren't real. No hallucinations. Sleep good at 7-8 hours nightly. Appetite healthy, weight stable at 142 lbs. Working full-time as dental hygienist, loves her job and patients. Mood 'happy' rated 8/10. Lives in apartment with partner. Enjoys salsa dancing and cooking. Attending wellness group monthly. Ten months sober from alcohol. Planning wedding for next year. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Carlos Mendoza, PMHNP-BC, Psychiatric Nurse Practitioner)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Young adult, professional scrubs, excellent grooming, cheerful demeanor
Mental_Status_Examination.Thought_Content: Future-oriented, minimal residual symptoms with insight

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Living with partner; employed full-time in healthcare; ten months sober; active social and recreational life.
Assessment_and_Plan: Excellent medication adherence and symptom stability.
fields.Author: Note written by Carlos Mendoza, PMHNP-BC, Psychiatric Nurse Practitioner — Dental Staff Health Services, 9921 Smile Center, Miami, FL 33101, Phone: (555) 103-7754, Fax: (555) 103-7755
